task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the OpenEMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating the agent has logged in using the provided admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located and accessed the patient record for Sofia Bradtke.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or demographics summary page for 'Sofia Bradtke' (DOB: 1959-08-06) is open and visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the demographics edit form to modify communication preferences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The demographics edit screen is active, specifically showing the 'Choices' or 'HIPAA' section where communication preferences can be modified.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Allow Email' preference is set to YES.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown menu or radio button for 'Allow Email' (or similar HIPAA email setting) is explicitly selected or typed as 'YES'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Allow Voice Message' preference is set to NO.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown menu or radio button for 'Allow Voice Message' (or similar HIPAA voice setting) is explicitly selected or typed as 'NO'.

task_completion.description: Verify the changes to the communication preferences were saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message (e.g., 'Patient data updated') is visible, or the demographics view mode shows the updated preferences (Allow Email: YES, Allow Voice Message: NO) outside of edit mode.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the OpenEMR web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the OpenEMR GUI, rather than terminal commands or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is modifying the actual patient record in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows the correct OpenEMR path, and the interface matches the standard OpenEMR layout, not a mocked HTML page or text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use a terminal to run SQL commands to update the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL 'UPDATE patient_data SET ...' commands or similar backend scripts are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Sofia Bradtke (PID: 5), DOB: 1959-08-06. Expected HIPAA preferences to be verified in the GUI - Allow Email: YES, Allow Voice Message: NO.
